message:
fix(core): clippy lint fixes across 9 frankenterm-core modules

aegis_entropy_anomaly.rs: Use mul_add() for fused multiply-add instead of
manual (a - b) * c + d arithmetic (clippy::suboptimal_flops). Improves
floating-point precision and may use hardware FMA instruction.

cancellation.rs: Replace children.iter() with &children in for-loop
(clippy::explicit_iter_loop) — idiomatic Rust iteration.

connector_host_runtime.rs: Simplify parts.pop() with ? operator instead
of if-let None check with explicit return (clippy::question_mark).

connector_mesh.rs: Sort routing candidates deterministically after
filtering — HashMap iteration order is random, so identical requests
could produce different candidate orderings. Adds sort_unstable() for
reproducible routing behavior in tests and production.

patterns.rs: Fix two detect calls to use &input_text (the preprocessed
lowercase copy) instead of &text (the raw input), ensuring pattern
detection operates on normalized text consistently.

runtime.rs: Remove unnecessary &mut on watch::Receiver parameter in
config_take_update — borrow_and_clone() only needs &self.

storage.rs: Match Ok(()) instead of Ok(_) for unit-returning execute_batch
(clippy::ignored_unit_patterns).

swarm_scheduler.rs: Use .copied() instead of .cloned() for f64 iterator
(clippy::cloned_instead_of_copied). Replace continue-in-match-arm with
empty block (clippy::needless_continue).

topology_orchestration.rs: Combine two match arms into one using nested
or-pattern: Running | Ready (clippy::unnested_or_patterns).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
